name: voting-app
description: MERN Voting App - single-service deployable monorepo (Express API + Vite React frontend)

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
